chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 538 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.2605/2019. 08.10.2025 Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. On the last date, following order was passed: “19.09.2025 Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. Paragraphs 12 and 13 of the impugned order demonstrate that the conclusion reached is on appraisal of facts / evidence. It is settled law that the learned Tribunal is the last fact finding forum in the statutory hierarchy. Counsel for the applicant is put on notice to demonstrate as to how any question of law arising from the said findings. To come up after two weeks.” In pursuance thereof, counsel does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
